combo.combo_doc_place: select item_code ,item_code||' - '||doc_place as item_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_doc_place where item_code in ('01','02')

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no)||' / '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membername ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,(0)::text,1) as mem_address_line1 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,(0)::text,2) as mem_address_line2 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,(0)::text,3) as mem_address_line3 ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,(0)::text,4) as mem_address_line4 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,'!doc_place!' as doc_place
--ที่อยู่ coop ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name ,'เลขที่'||' '||sc_cnt_m_coop.address||' ต.'||sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name as coop_address_line1 ,'อ.'||pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code)||' จ.'||pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code)||' '||sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode as coop_address_line2 ,'โทร '||sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no||' โทรสาร '||sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no as coop_address_line3
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_cnt_m_coop
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
/*WHERE*/
